headline: Chevron Corporation (CVX) Secures Texas Pacific Land Support on Microsoft’s Project Kilby
summary: Chevron Corporation (NYSE:CVX) is one of the best stocks to buy now for good returns. On June 23, Chevron Corporation (NYSE:CVX) selected Texas Pacific Land Corporation to provide land and brackish water resources for its Project Kilby. Project Kilby is a massive $7 billion initiative by Chevron Corporation (NYSE:CVX) and Microsoft to construct a 2.67 […]
